title: Admissions Guidelines
description: Welcome to the admissions portal of Jamia Islamabad. Review our criteria, document checklists, and calendars to start your application.

eligibility.title: Eligibility & Criteria
eligibility.generalDesc: Admissions are open to all students regardless of regional origin, provided they pass the initial interview and entry test.
eligibility.darsDesc: Candidates must have completed Middle school (Grade 8) or Matriculation for entry into the basic year.
eligibility.hifzDesc: Open to younger candidates (ages 8-12) who have completed basic Qaida and Quran recitation training.
eligibility.conductDesc: Applicants must agree to abide by all rules regarding uniforms (white shalwar kameez, cap, black waistcoat) and mobile phone usage limitations.

documents.title: Required Documents Checklist
documents.doc4: Attested copies of previous educational certificates
documents.doc5: Character certificate from previous institution (if applicable)

fees.title: Fee Structure
fees.note: * Education, accommodation, and meals are provided at no cost. The PKR 3,000 admission fee is a one-time registration charge applicable to all programmes.
fees.admissionDesc: Admission Fee — charged once at enrollment, for all courses
fees.otherFeesDesc: Tuition · Hostel · Meals · Exams — all completely waived

calendar.title: Academic Session Calendar
calendar.timeline1Desc: Submit digital applications online and print replicas.
calendar.timeline2Desc: Evaluations for theological knowledge, basic recitation, and academic fit.
calendar.timeline3Desc: Final list of selected candidates is displayed at admin office and directory.
calendar.timeline4Desc: Commencement of the new academic session.

enroll.title: Ready to Enroll?
enroll.desc: Initialize your online profile draft now. Keep track of updates and prepare your documents for validation.
